name: degoog-toolkit
description: SearXNG integrations and a growing collection of degoog plugins.
author: SoPat712

plugins.name: Sports Results
plugins.description: Shows live sports scores, schedules, and standings. Activates on natural queries like team names, 'premier league standings', or 'lakers vs warriors'. Natural language triggering is on by default and can be disabled in Settings.

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description: Currency converter with live rates. Triggers on !cur / !currency / !convert and on bare natural queries like '100 usd to eur'. Natural language triggering is on by default and can be disabled in Settings.

plugins.name: TMDB
plugins.description: Shows rich info panels for movies, TV shows, and actors. Activates on natural-language queries (e.g. 'la la land', 'emma stone') and on TMDB, IMDB, or Allocine links in search results.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Current weather with interactive charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity), a 7-day forecast and configurable units (imperial by default — Fahrenheit, mph, mmHg, inch). Supports !weather <city>, leading phrases like 'weather in rome', and trailing-keyword queries like 'rome weather' or 'london forecast today'.

plugins.name: Speedtest
plugins.description: Internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, and a circular gauge. Supports !speed (aliases !speedtest, !speed-test, !networkspeed, !internetspeed) plus natural phrases like 'speed test', 'run a speedtest', or 'how fast is internet'. Natural language triggering is on by default. Note: for !speedtest to route to this plugin, disable degoog's core built-in Speed Test command.

plugins.name: Search History
plugins.description: Stores your past searches with timestamps and surfaces them as a dropdown on the search bar. Use !history (or natural phrases like 'search history') to view a paginated, deletable list. Entries are kept locally in data/history.json and the maximum count is configurable.

plugins.name: Unit Converter
plugins.description: Unit converter for length, mass, volume, temperature, area, and speed. Supports natural queries like '12 ft to in' or '!unit 100c f'.

engines.name: SearXNG
engines.description: Search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Images
engines.description: Image search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Videos
engines.description: Video search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG News
engines.description: News search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG File
engines.description: File search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

themes.name: LiterallyGoogle
themes.description: A theme replicating Google's design, with a sticky header and full-width plugin slots (trankil-style) for rich plugin layouts like TMDB, Weather, Currency, and Speedtest.
